Class FactoryEntity

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.smartfactory.patterns.observer.FactoryEntity
All Implemented Interfaces:
Subject
Direct Known Subclasses:
FactoryEntityDecorator, Machine, Operator, Robot
public abstract class FactoryEntity extends Object implements Subject
Abstract base class for all factory entities. Implements the Subject interface for the Observer pattern.

    Current task type assigned to the entity.

    Unique identifier for the entity.
    protected Status
    status
    Current status of the entity.
    protected int
    taskCounter
    Counter for tasks performed, může být použito pro statistiky nebo logiku stavů.

  • Method Details

    • attach

      public void attach(Observer observer)
      Attach an observer to this entity.
      Specified by:
      attach in interface Subject
      Parameters:
      observer - The observer to attach.

    • detach

      public void detach(Observer observer)
      Detach an observer from this entity.
      Specified by:
      detach in interface Subject
      Parameters:
      observer - The observer to detach.

    • notifyObservers

      public void notifyObservers(Event event)
      Notify all attached observers about an event.
      Specified by:
      notifyObservers in interface Subject
      Parameters:
      event - The event to notify about.

    • performTask

      public void performTask()
      Perform the current task based on the entity's state.

    • setState

      public void setState(EntityState newState)
      Change the state of the entity.
      Parameters:
      newState - The new state to transition to.

    • accept

      public abstract void accept(Visitor visitor)
      Abstract method to accept a visitor.
      Parameters:
      visitor - The visitor instance.

    • executeTask

      public void executeTask(TaskType taskType)
      Execute the assigned task using a strategy or specific logic.
      Parameters:
      taskType - The task type to execute.

    • repair

      public boolean repair()
      Simulace opravy entity.
      Specified by:
      repair in interface Subject
      Returns:
      True, pokud byla oprava úspěšná, jinak False.

    • getReliability

      public double getReliability()
      Simulace získání reliability entity.
      Returns:
      Reliabilita entity (0.0 - 1.0).

    • reportIssue

      public void reportIssue(Issue issue)
      Report an issue in the entity.
      Parameters:
      issue - The issue to report.

    • isTaskFailed

      public boolean isTaskFailed()
      Zjistí, zda úkol selhal (může být implementováno na základě další logiky).
      Returns:
      True, pokud úkol selhal, jinak False.
